entries.title: Security hardening: profile, quiz, and streak data
entries.content: Locked down sensitive columns and leaderboard reads: Discord identifiers are no longer exposed to anonymous visitors, quiz correct-answer flags are hidden from the client, and streak leaderboards now use a safe server-side function instead of broad public table access.

breaking.title: Security hardening: profile, quiz, and streak data
breaking.content: Locked down sensitive columns and leaderboard reads: Discord identifiers are no longer exposed to anonymous visitors, quiz correct-answer flags are hidden from the client, and streak leaderboards now use a safe server-side function instead of broad public table access.

entries.title: Two-factor enforcement at sign-in
entries.content: Accounts with an authenticator enrolled now must enter their 6-digit code during login before the session is granted.

breaking.title: Two-factor enforcement at sign-in
breaking.content: Accounts with an authenticator enrolled now must enter their 6-digit code during login before the session is granted.

entries.title: Bug fixes across admin tools
entries.content: Fixed sorting on the applications queue, broken pagination on the gallery admin, and a stale-cache issue on the FAQ editor.

entries.title: Performance & mobile polish
entries.content: Sidebar swipe-to-open, faster route loading, reduced layout shift, and tighter mobile spacing across the site.

entries.title: Partners group added to sidebar
entries.content: New "Partners" group in the main navigation, starting with 4Dupe as the first listed partner.

entries.title: Maintenance mode gate
entries.content: Admins can flip the site into maintenance mode, showing a branded gate to non-staff visitors.

entries.title: Global search & notifications bell
entries.content: Site-wide search palette (Cmd/Ctrl+K) and a notifications bell in the navbar for in-app alerts.

entries.title: User Reports admin area
entries.content: New /admin?tab=reports section lets staff review, triage, and resolve reports about accounts, plugins, and other content. Status filters, admin notes, and reporter details are all included.

entries.title: Organizations & team profiles
entries.content: Players can create organizations, invite members, and publish a public org profile page.

entries.title: Admin alerts for new reports
entries.content: Whenever a user submits a report, every admin/owner gets an in-app notification, and an email is sent to the alert address when configured.

entries.title: Mods, modpacks, resource & data packs
entries.content: Browse pages for mods, modpacks, resource packs, and data packs, with detail views, likes, saves, and reviews.

entries.title: Transactional email pipeline
entries.content: Migrated transactional email to a queued dispatcher with suppression list, unsubscribe tokens, and React Email templates.

entries.title: Uptime monitoring & status page
entries.content: Live uptime checks, incident timeline, and per-service 30-day uptime percentages on the status page.

entries.title: Login & vote streaks
entries.content: Daily login and vote streaks now track current and best runs, with a global streak leaderboard.

entries.title: Quiz system with leaderboards
entries.content: Added quizzes with timed attempts, scoring, per-quiz leaderboards, and an admin authoring area.

entries.title: Plugin marketplace beta
entries.content: Introduced the plugin marketplace with versions, screenshots, JAR uploads, likes, saves, and reviews.

entries.title: Ban appeals system launched
entries.content: New public ban appeal form with admin review queue, status updates, and email notifications to both the appellant and staff.

entries.title: Discord account linking
entries.content: Players can now link their Discord account from their profile, syncing username and avatar back to the site.

entries.title: Sitemap & SEO pass
entries.content: Generated dynamic sitemap, added per-page Open Graph and Twitter cards, and structured data on detail pages.

entries.title: Bug fixes: tickets & search
entries.content: Fixed unread badge on tickets, garbled emojis in ticket replies, and search returning archived items.

entries.title: Email infrastructure: domain setup
entries.content: Configured a verified sender subdomain, SPF/DKIM, and a hardened From: address for all outgoing mail.

breaking.title: Email infrastructure: domain setup
breaking.content: Configured a verified sender subdomain, SPF/DKIM, and a hardened From: address for all outgoing mail.

entries.title: Reviews on mods & plugins
entries.content: Star ratings and written reviews on mods and plugins with one-review-per-user enforcement.

entries.title: Discover items hub
entries.content: Unified discover hub for community-submitted builds, datapacks, and resources with slugged detail pages.

entries.title: Support tickets
entries.content: Players can open private support tickets with threaded messaging between user and staff.

entries.title: Custom roles & permissions
entries.content: Granular custom roles and a permissions matrix so owners can scope what each role can do in the admin panel.

entries.title: Wiki articles
entries.content: Admins can publish long-form wiki articles with rich formatting and a public browse page.

entries.title: FAQ with voting
entries.content: New FAQ section with categories, search, and helpful/unhelpful voting.

entries.title: Gallery launched
entries.content: Community gallery with screenshot uploads, captions, and an admin moderation queue.

entries.title: Bug fixes: auth & avatars
entries.content: Fixed sign-in redirect loops, avatar upload size errors, and a profile save race condition.

entries.title: Performance pass
entries.content: Reduced bundle size, added route-level code splitting, and improved Lighthouse scores across the board.

entries.title: Events calendar
entries.content: Public events listing with start/end times, descriptions, and an admin scheduler.

entries.title: Server status widget
entries.content: Live online/offline status and player count badge in the navbar and on the homepage.

entries.title: Contact form
entries.content: Visitors can send contact messages to staff with email confirmation and an admin inbox.

entries.title: News & announcements
entries.content: Added a news section with cover images, article pages, and pinned announcements.

entries.title: Rules page overhaul
entries.content: Rebuilt rules page with collapsible sections, anchored links, and an admin editor.

entries.title: Staff applications
entries.content: Public application form for staff roles with an admin review queue and status updates.

entries.title: Player accounts & profiles
entries.content: Sign up, sign in, and a basic profile page with display name and avatar.

entries.title: CarnageMC website launched
entries.content: First public release of the CarnageMC site with home, rules, staff, and apply pages.
